attributes.title: [Azure Activity Logs OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Platform-level audit logs for Azure Resource Manager control plane operations. Monitor operation volume, failure rates, category distribution, and recent activity.

This dashboard provides an overview of Azure Activity Log control plane operations:
- Operation volume and trend analysis by category
- Failure rates and error tracking
- Policy violation monitoring
- Resource health status
- Service incident tracking
- Top resource providers and operations
